HikariPool-1 - Starting... 2026-05-07T13:13:57.023+05:30 INFO 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool : HikariPool-1 - Added connection conn0: url=jdbc:h2:mem:testdb user=SA 2026-05-07T13:13:57.027+05:30 INFO 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-05-07T13:13:57.068+05:30 WARN 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-05-07T13:13:58.463+05:30 INFO 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists lessons cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists resources cascade Hibernate: create table lessons ( duration_minutes integer, is_preview boolean not null, order_index integer not null, course_id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), instructor_id bigint, lesson_id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), content_type varchar(255) not null check (content_type in ('VIDEO','ARTICLE','PDF')), content_url TEXT, description TEXT, title varchar(255) not null, primary key (lesson_id) ) Hibernate: create table resources ( created_at timestamp(6), lesson_id bigint not null, resource_id bigint generated by default as identity, size_kb bigint, file_type varchar(255) not null check (file_type in ('PDF','SLIDES','CODE','IMAGE','ZIP','OTHER')), file_url TEXT not null, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (resource_id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists resources add constraint FK4ckipoe4tccull4lm5q2l09rq foreign key (lesson_id) references lessons 2026-05-07T13:13:58.542+05:30 INFO 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] j.LocalContainerEntityManagerFactoryBean : Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-05-07T13:13:59.275+05:30 INFO 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] o.s.d.j.r.query.QueryEnhancerFactory : Hibernate is in classpath; If applicable, HQL parser will be used. 2026-05-07T13:14:00.442+05:30 WARN 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] JpaBaseConfiguration$JpaWebConfiguration : spring.jpa.open-in-view is enabled by default. Therefore, database queries may be performed during view rendering. testcase.name: deleteLesson_adminSuccess
testcase.system-out: 2026-05-07T13:14:04.452+05:30 DEBUG 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] c.e.l.security.JwtAuthenticationFilter : JWT authenticated: userId=1 role=ADMIN Hibernate: select l1_0.lesson_id, l1_0.content_type, l1_0.content_url, l1_0.course_id, l1_0.created_at, l1_0.description, l1_0.duration_minutes, l1_0.instructor_id, l1_0.is_preview, l1_0.order_index, l1_0.title, l1_0.updated_at from lessons l1_0 where l1_0.lesson_id=? Hibernate: delete from lessons where lesson_id=? Hibernate: update lessons set order_index=(order_index-1) where course_id=? and order_index>? 2026-05-07T13:14:04.482+05:30 INFO 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] c.e.l.service.impl.LessonServiceImpl : Lesson deleted: id=1 courseId=10 Hibernate: select coalesce(sum(l1_0.duration_minutes), 0) from lessons l1_0 where l1_0.course_id=? 2026-05-07T13:14:04.483+05:30 DEBUG 4044 --- [lesson-service] [ main] c.e.l.service.impl.LessonServiceImpl : Notified course-service: courseId=10 totalMinutes=20 Hibernate: select l1_0.lesson_id, l1_0.content_type, l1_0.content_url, l1_0.course_id, l1_0.created_at, l1_0.description, l1_0.duration_minutes, l1_0.instructor_id, l1_0.is_preview, l1_0.order_index, l1_0.title, l1_0.updated_at from lessons l1_0 where l1_0.lesson_id=?
